concept: Apotheosis ACE - A majestic, divine, and elegant church party management system.

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) and font-light or font-black to create tension.
Never use Inter or generic sans for headings.
Body text should be highly readable.
Max heading size text-5xl to text-6xl.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous Spacing Philosophy (p-6, p-8, p-12). Use high padding inside containers with borders.
spacing_and_layout.grids: Bento Grid Protocol for the Comic Gallery (Mode A: The Tetris Grid). Admin dashboards use Mode B: The Control Room Grid.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense content, center-align hero text only if it improves visual rhythm.
spacing_and_layout.components: Custom HTML/Tailwind for Guest Welcome & Gallery; Shadcn/UI for Admin Dashboard and Forms (heavily customized to dark green/gold).

surface_strategies.guest_cards: Glassmorphism (The Crystal Variant). backdrop-blur-xl, bg-black/40, border border-gold/30. Soft ambient shadow.
surface_strategies.admin_dashboard: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Expose the skeleton, minimal borders.
surface_strategies.buttons: Flat gold background for primary, black text. Hover: Lighter gold. Secondary buttons: transparent with gold border.

animations.micro_interactions: Hover states on all buttons and cards. Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow increase.
animations.page_transitions: Fade and slight upward motion (framer-motion or simple CSS transition).

backgrounds.description: Large golden castle in paradise with water, used for the main guest welcome background (with heavy fir-green/black overlay)
Golden castle spires, used for alternate page backgrounds

gallery_comic.description: Baroque ceiling fresco, use in the religious comic gallery
Man in brown robe praying/painting, use in gallery
Lamb on bible cross illustration, use in gallery
Fresco with cherubs, use in gallery

admin_assets.description: Long elegant table, used as a subtle banner or card header in the admin dashboard

components_instructions.welcome_page: Hero section with background image (hero_background) covered by a bg-black/60 overlay to ensure text readability. Include French verses. Center aligned. Button to register.
components_instructions.registration_form: Shadcn Form, highly customized. Use Crystal Glassmorphism surface. data-testid='guest-registration-form'.
components_instructions.dish_selection: Display menu based on table number. Once selected, show a 2-minute countdown timer. During this time, the user can edit. After 2 mins, lock the selection. data-testid='dish-selection-form'.
components_instructions.comic_gallery: A masonry or bento grid displaying the religious images mixed with textual verses. Create an integrated storytelling scroll experience.
components_instructions.admin_dashboard: Tabs or Sidebar layout. Tab 1: Manage Tables (Add table, specify places). Tab 2: Manage Menu. Tab 3: View Results.
components_instructions.admin_results: List of tables in numerical order. Each table shows guests and their chosen dishes (e.g., '1 - dish such-and-such'). Use Shadcn Accordion or Card layout for each table. data-testid='admin-results-panel'.

testing.instructions: All interactive elements, forms, inputs, and major containers MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='submit-order-button').

tech_stack.frontend: React.js (.js files), Tailwind CSS, Shadcn/ui (customized), Framer Motion (optional for gallery)

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the frontend using React (.js) and Tailwind CSS based on these exact colors and fonts.
Create the Django backend to support the guest registration, menu management, and 2-minute dish locking logic.
Ensure all copy is in French, incorporating religious verses subtly into the welcome page and gallery.
Incorporate the provided media URLs. DO NOT USE PLACEHOLDERS.
Follow the Anti-AI Designer E1 principles: Avoid pure center alignment for standard content, use generous padding, and ensure high contrast.
Ensure the timer logic accurately prevents updates to dish choice after 2 minutes.
